name: awesome-readme
description: Create GitHub READMEs that earn stars. Auto-classifies your project as Story-mode (real pain point + narrative arc), Utility-mode (single-purpose tool, visuals do the work), or Hybrid. Routes README visuals through the gpt-image-2 skill (ChatGPT Images 2.0 via the Codex CLI) for diagrams with ~99% text fidelity, with explicit fallback guidance when the user has a different image-gen backend.
